content:
# elizaos-plugins/registry Daily Update (Mar 25, 2026)
## OVERVIEW 
The day saw the introduction of a new plugin for TCG card arbitrage intelligence and new requests for wallet intelligence and agent commerce integrations. Discussions continued on existing issues, particularly regarding AI agent payment implementations and API endpoint usage.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

No code changes, bug fixes, or documentation enhancements were reported for this day.

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
A new pull request, [#317](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/317), was opened to add the `plugin-gapsense` for TCG card arbitrage intelligence.

## CLOSED ISSUES
No issues were closed on this day.

## NEW ISSUES
### New Plugin Requests
- A request was made for a "WalletIQ" plugin, which would provide wallet intelligence for EVM address profiling, to be published as `@elizaos/plugin-walletiq` ([#318](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/318)).
- An integration request for "Pyrimid x402 Agent Commerce via MCP" was opened, aiming to enable ElizaOS agents to discover and pay for APIs using x402 on Base ([#6668](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/6668)).

## ACTIVE ISSUES
### API Endpoint Clarification
Discussion continued on the `/api/agents/{agentId}/rooms -> API endpoint not found` issue ([#5121](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/5121)). The latest comments from June 2025 clarified the transition from "rooms" to a "channel-based architecture" for messaging, providing detailed REST API structures for sending messages to and from agents. It was noted that the old `/api/agents/{agentId}/message` endpoint is outdated, and the new messaging system is recommended for ElizaOS 1.x.

### AI Agent Payment Implementations
The issue "AI Agent Payment Implementation Guide - Circle + Coinbase APIs" ([#6244](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/6244)) received new comments from `majorelalexis-stack` on March 25th and 26th, 2026, and March 23rd, 2026. These comments consistently highlighted MAXIA, an AI-to-AI marketplace for agent service discovery and trading using USDC across 14 chains, offering collaboration or integration.
